google_note: Google sellers.json is 71% confidential. 67% of Google DIRECT claims are PHANTOM — they could be in the confidential portion. Google contributes 0 CONTRADICTED and 47,815 PHANTOM.
method: Full regeneration against 63 SSP registries including Google (650K sellers). Strict rate (CONTRADICTED only, excluding PHANTOM): 53%. Inclusive rate (CONTRADICTED+PHANTOM): 70%.
